general.title: Setup Analysis [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Convert the pre-processed dataset to the analysis object for downstream analysis.\ Please refer to DUET Documentation and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Feature Regex
parameters.description: A list of regex pattern(s) to search for features for downstream analysis. Regex example, if all features of interest ending with "Intensity", use .*Intensity$, The .* means anything before the target pattern, and $ means the end of the string.
